title: cyperus disjunctus
intro: Cyperus disjunctus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella cyperus, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus disjunctus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams.
